calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-02-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-29-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for Default Judgment prove-up hearing as to Defendant Nikolay R. Levi an individual a/k/a Nick Levy, DDS.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:52:39 a.m. and concluding at 10:03:57 a.m.(D505)

George M. Lee, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of the Plaintiff MV CAL, LLC. Via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Nickolay R. Levi an individual a/k/a Nick Levy, DDS not appearing.

Complaint for Breach of Contract filed April 20, 2023
Proof of personal service filed August 17, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendant Nickolay R. Levi, an individual a/k/a Nick Levy, DDS on August 18, 2023
Motion/Notice of Motion on Hearing for Request of Default Judgment filed August 29, 2023
Notice of hearing/proof of service filed September 18, 2023.

Plaintiff's counsel would like to proceed on the papers submitted to the court and is requesting to waive witness personal appearance and order to shorten time.
The Court grants the waiver of witness and order shortening time.
Counsel to summarize and provide offer of proof to the Court.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit A: Lease agreement
Exhibit B: 1 amendment to the lease
Exhibit C: 5 Day notice
Exhibit D: Lease Ledger
Counsel requests that the exhibits be moved into evidence.
Court grants the motion.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of the Plaintiff MV CAL, LLC and against Nickolay R. Levi an individual a/k/a Nick Levy, DDS as follows:

Plaintiff prays for:
Damages $94,759.79
Interest $5,560.97
Attorney's fees $9,495.00
Costs $1,589.69
Total Judgment $111,405.45

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
